tickets.summary: Admins intermittently cannot log in after password reset.
tickets.impact: Tenant admins blocked from approving agent access for 42 minutes.

tickets.summary: Usage export has duplicate rows for retried jobs.
tickets.impact: Finance team manually deduplicates daily report.

tickets.summary: Long-running agent task reports success before writing requested artifact.
tickets.impact: Reviewer accepted an empty report during UAT.

tickets.summary: Tenant list filter resets after browser refresh.
Tool-call timeout leaves task in unknown state.
tickets.impact: Operator must inspect logs and restart the run manually.

tickets.summary: Payment processing fails intermittently for premium-tier customers; additionally, customer reports confusing UI labels on the same checkout page.
tickets.impact: Revenue loss for premium accounts (estimated 15 affected transactions). UI confusion is non-blocking but generates support volume.

tickets.summary: Passwordless login flow fails silently for returning users on mobile devices.
tickets.impact: Users cannot log in via mobile; no error message displayed. ~40 reports in last 48 hours.

tickets.summary: Agent session does not persist across browser tabs causing users to re-authenticate.
tickets.impact: Operators lose work when switching tabs; ~8 incidents reported this week.

tickets.summary: Invoice PDFs for enterprise accounts contain incorrect VAT calculations.
tickets.impact: Regulatory compliance concern; ~23 invoices affected in current billing cycle.

tickets.summary: Dashboard performance metrics load 30% slower during peak hours for multi-tenant views.
tickets.impact: Dashboard takes 8-12 seconds to render during 9-11 AM peak.
